=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (18:3-18:18) TS377010: `Effect.mapError` expresses the same error-type transformation more directly than `Effect.catchAll` followed by `Effect.fail`. effect(catchAllToMapError)
  Fix 0: "Disable catchAllToMapError for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable catchAllToMapError for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.mapError"

[D2] (23:3-23:18) TS377010: `Effect.mapError` expresses the same error-type transformation more directly than `Effect.catchAll` followed by `Effect.fail`. effect(catchAllToMapError)
  Fix 0: "Disable catchAllToMapError for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable catchAllToMapError for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.mapError"

[D3] (31:3-31:18) TS377010: `Effect.mapError` expresses the same error-type transformation more directly than `Effect.catchAll` followed by `Effect.fail`. effect(catchAllToMapError)
  Fix 0: "Disable catchAllToMapError for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable catchAllToMapError for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.mapError"

[D4] (36:3-36:18) TS377010: `Effect.mapError` expresses the same error-type transformation more directly than `Effect.catchAll` followed by `Effect.fail`. effect(catchAllToMapError)
  Fix 0: "Disable catchAllToMapError for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable catchAllToMapError for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.mapError"

[D5] (65:3-65:18) TS377010: `Effect.mapError` expresses the same error-type transformation more directly than `Effect.catchAll` followed by `Effect.fail`. effect(catchAllToMapError)
  Fix 0: "Disable catchAllToMapError for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable catchAllToMapError for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.mapError"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable catchAllToMapError for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable catchAllToMapError for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.mapError" ===

--- file:///.src/catchAllToMapError.ts ---
// @effect-v3
// @effect-diagnostics catchToOrElseSucceed:off
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

class MyErrorTagged {
  readonly _tag = "MyErrorTagged"
  constructor(readonly cause: unknown) {}
}

class AnotherError {
  readonly _tag = "AnotherError"
  constructor(readonly message: string) {}
}

// Should trigger: catchAll with arrow function returning Effect.fail
export const shouldTriggerArrow = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.mapError((cause) =>new MyErrorTagged(cause))
)

// Should trigger: catchAll with arrow function returning Effect.fail (block body)
export const shouldTriggerArrowBlock = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll((cause) => {
    return Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause))
  })
)

// Should trigger: pipe style
export const shouldTriggerPipe = pipe(
  Effect.fail("error"),
  Effect.catchAll((cause) => Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause)))
)

// Should trigger: with function expression
export const shouldTriggerFunctionExpr = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll(function(cause) {
    return Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause))
  })
)

// Should NOT trigger: catchAll with logic other than just Effect.fail
export const shouldNotTriggerWithLogic = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll((cause) => {
    console.log(cause)
    return Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause))
  })
)

// Should NOT trigger: catchAll returning Effect.succeed
export const shouldNotTriggerSucceed = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll(() => Effect.succeed(42))
)

// Should NOT trigger: catchAll with Effect.flatMap or other operations
export const shouldNotTriggerChained = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll((cause) =>
    Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause)).pipe(
      Effect.tap(() => Effect.void)
    )
  )
)

// Should trigger: simple error wrapping
export const shouldTriggerSimple = Effect.fail("original").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll((e) => Effect.fail(new AnotherError(String(e))))
)


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable catchAllToMapError for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable catchAllToMapError for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.mapError" ===

--- file:///.src/catchAllToMapError.ts ---
// @effect-v3
// @effect-diagnostics catchToOrElseSucceed:off
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

class MyErrorTagged {
  readonly _tag = "MyErrorTagged"
  constructor(readonly cause: unknown) {}
}

class AnotherError {
  readonly _tag = "AnotherError"
  constructor(readonly message: string) {}
}

// Should trigger: catchAll with arrow function returning Effect.fail
export const shouldTriggerArrow = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll((cause) => Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause)))
)

// Should trigger: catchAll with arrow function returning Effect.fail (block body)
export const shouldTriggerArrowBlock = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.mapError((cause) => {
    returnnew MyErrorTagged(cause)
  })
)

// Should trigger: pipe style
export const shouldTriggerPipe = pipe(
  Effect.fail("error"),
  Effect.catchAll((cause) => Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause)))
)

// Should trigger: with function expression
export const shouldTriggerFunctionExpr = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll(function(cause) {
    return Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause))
  })
)

// Should NOT trigger: catchAll with logic other than just Effect.fail
export const shouldNotTriggerWithLogic = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll((cause) => {
    console.log(cause)
    return Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause))
  })
)

// Should NOT trigger: catchAll returning Effect.succeed
export const shouldNotTriggerSucceed = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll(() => Effect.succeed(42))
)

// Should NOT trigger: catchAll with Effect.flatMap or other operations
export const shouldNotTriggerChained = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll((cause) =>
    Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause)).pipe(
      Effect.tap(() => Effect.void)
    )
  )
)

// Should trigger: simple error wrapping
export const shouldTriggerSimple = Effect.fail("original").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll((e) => Effect.fail(new AnotherError(String(e))))
)


=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable catchAllToMapError for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable catchAllToMapError for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.mapError" ===

--- file:///.src/catchAllToMapError.ts ---
// @effect-v3
// @effect-diagnostics catchToOrElseSucceed:off
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

class MyErrorTagged {
  readonly _tag = "MyErrorTagged"
  constructor(readonly cause: unknown) {}
}

class AnotherError {
  readonly _tag = "AnotherError"
  constructor(readonly message: string) {}
}

// Should trigger: catchAll with arrow function returning Effect.fail
export const shouldTriggerArrow = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll((cause) => Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause)))
)

// Should trigger: catchAll with arrow function returning Effect.fail (block body)
export const shouldTriggerArrowBlock = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll((cause) => {
    return Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause))
  })
)

// Should trigger: pipe style
export const shouldTriggerPipe = pipe(
  Effect.fail("error"),
  Effect.mapError((cause) =>new MyErrorTagged(cause))
)

// Should trigger: with function expression
export const shouldTriggerFunctionExpr = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll(function(cause) {
    return Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause))
  })
)

// Should NOT trigger: catchAll with logic other than just Effect.fail
export const shouldNotTriggerWithLogic = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll((cause) => {
    console.log(cause)
    return Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause))
  })
)

// Should NOT trigger: catchAll returning Effect.succeed
export const shouldNotTriggerSucceed = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll(() => Effect.succeed(42))
)

// Should NOT trigger: catchAll with Effect.flatMap or other operations
export const shouldNotTriggerChained = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll((cause) =>
    Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause)).pipe(
      Effect.tap(() => Effect.void)
    )
  )
)

// Should trigger: simple error wrapping
export const shouldTriggerSimple = Effect.fail("original").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll((e) => Effect.fail(new AnotherError(String(e))))
)


=== [D4] Fix 0: "Disable catchAllToMapError for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 1: "Disable catchAllToMapError for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.mapError" ===

--- file:///.src/catchAllToMapError.ts ---
// @effect-v3
// @effect-diagnostics catchToOrElseSucceed:off
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

class MyErrorTagged {
  readonly _tag = "MyErrorTagged"
  constructor(readonly cause: unknown) {}
}

class AnotherError {
  readonly _tag = "AnotherError"
  constructor(readonly message: string) {}
}

// Should trigger: catchAll with arrow function returning Effect.fail
export const shouldTriggerArrow = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll((cause) => Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause)))
)

// Should trigger: catchAll with arrow function returning Effect.fail (block body)
export const shouldTriggerArrowBlock = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll((cause) => {
    return Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause))
  })
)

// Should trigger: pipe style
export const shouldTriggerPipe = pipe(
  Effect.fail("error"),
  Effect.catchAll((cause) => Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause)))
)

// Should trigger: with function expression
export const shouldTriggerFunctionExpr = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.mapError(function(cause) {
    returnnew MyErrorTagged(cause)
  })
)

// Should NOT trigger: catchAll with logic other than just Effect.fail
export const shouldNotTriggerWithLogic = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll((cause) => {
    console.log(cause)
    return Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause))
  })
)

// Should NOT trigger: catchAll returning Effect.succeed
export const shouldNotTriggerSucceed = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll(() => Effect.succeed(42))
)

// Should NOT trigger: catchAll with Effect.flatMap or other operations
export const shouldNotTriggerChained = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll((cause) =>
    Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause)).pipe(
      Effect.tap(() => Effect.void)
    )
  )
)

// Should trigger: simple error wrapping
export const shouldTriggerSimple = Effect.fail("original").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll((e) => Effect.fail(new AnotherError(String(e))))
)


=== [D5] Fix 0: "Disable catchAllToMapError for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 1: "Disable catchAllToMapError for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.mapError" ===

--- file:///.src/catchAllToMapError.ts ---
// @effect-v3
// @effect-diagnostics catchToOrElseSucceed:off
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

class MyErrorTagged {
  readonly _tag = "MyErrorTagged"
  constructor(readonly cause: unknown) {}
}

class AnotherError {
  readonly _tag = "AnotherError"
  constructor(readonly message: string) {}
}

// Should trigger: catchAll with arrow function returning Effect.fail
export const shouldTriggerArrow = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll((cause) => Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause)))
)

// Should trigger: catchAll with arrow function returning Effect.fail (block body)
export const shouldTriggerArrowBlock = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll((cause) => {
    return Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause))
  })
)

// Should trigger: pipe style
export const shouldTriggerPipe = pipe(
  Effect.fail("error"),
  Effect.catchAll((cause) => Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause)))
)

// Should trigger: with function expression
export const shouldTriggerFunctionExpr = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll(function(cause) {
    return Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause))
  })
)

// Should NOT trigger: catchAll with logic other than just Effect.fail
export const shouldNotTriggerWithLogic = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll((cause) => {
    console.log(cause)
    return Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause))
  })
)

// Should NOT trigger: catchAll returning Effect.succeed
export const shouldNotTriggerSucceed = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll(() => Effect.succeed(42))
)

// Should NOT trigger: catchAll with Effect.flatMap or other operations
export const shouldNotTriggerChained = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
  Effect.catchAll((cause) =>
    Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause)).pipe(
      Effect.tap(() => Effect.void)
    )
  )
)

// Should trigger: simple error wrapping
export const shouldTriggerSimple = Effect.fail("original").pipe(
  Effect.mapError((e) =>new AnotherError(String(e)))
)
